tools.name: deploy_decision_model
tools.description: Deploy a DMN decision model to the care plan writer's internal decision engine. The model becomes available for care plan generation and direct evaluation.

dmn_xml.description: DMN 1.3 XML document as a string

tools.name: list_decision_models
tools.description: List all decision models currently deployed in the care plan writer.

tools.name: evaluate_decision
tools.description: Evaluate a deployed DMN decision model with test inputs and return the decision output. Useful for validating extracted DMN before committing.

model_id.description: ID of the deployed decision model

inputs.description: DMN input values keyed by input data name (e.g., {"Systolic BP": 142, "Has Diabetes": true})

tools.name: ingest_knowledge
tools.description: Ingest a clinical recommendation or document chunk into the care plan writer's knowledge base for retrieval during care plan generation.

source_cpg.description: Identifier of the source CPG (e.g., SYN-HTN-2026-001)

title.description: Title of the recommendation or section

content.description: The recommendation text or document content

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for clinical content relevant to a query. Returns ranked results with similarity scores.

source_cpg.description: Optionally scope search to a specific CPG

tools.name: generate_careplan
tools.description: Generate a patient-specific FHIR CarePlan from patient data. Accepts a FHIR Bundle or IPS document, invokes applicable decision models, retrieves relevant recommendations, and assembles a FHIR CarePlan Bundle.

patient_data.description: FHIR Bundle or IPS document containing the patient's clinical data

tools.name: get_careplan
tools.description: Retrieve a previously generated care plan by ID.

careplan_id.description: ID of the care plan to retrieve

tools.name: approve_careplan
tools.description: Approve or reject a generated care plan. Approval may trigger BPMN generation and dispatch to the automation service.

status.description: New status for the care plan
